  hostveil   Score: 16 (Critical)  |  6 findings
6/6
> [MEDIUM] Service is published on a public interface  vaultwarden
  [HIGH] Service should sit behind a reverse proxy  vaultwarden
  [LOW] Container allows privilege escalation  vaultwarden
  [LOW] Container root filesystem is writable  vaultwarden
  [LOW] Stack relies on the default bridge network  vaultwarden
  [HIGH] Vaultwarden domain is configured for public HTTP  vaultwarden
